artPrompt: The dramatic instant a carny's gloved hand slaps down over a rigged wheel of fortune, forcing a tumbling coin and die to be tossed twice as hot gold and red light flare and a sly grin glints in the shadows of a tattered tent. A blank illegible rules placard hangs crooked above. The cheating hand anchors the lower frame, the doubled toss rising upward. Wide 4:3 landscape, carnival red, smoky black, hot gold, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: House Rules
text:
The next time a player would roll a die or flip a coin this turn, that player rolls or flips twice and you choose which result they keep.
Draw a card. The house wrote the rules. The house can read them however it likes.
flavorText: Posted in faded ink above the wheel: 'All decisions of the management are final and also correct.'
